name: a4_dependency_audit
outcome_goal: pip-audit and npm audit --audit-level=high both exit 0; patch-version bumps landed; minor/major bumps filed as bugs.
verify_command: bash -lc "cd 'Code&DBs/Workflow' && pip-audit && cd surfaces/app && npm audit --audit-level=high"

jobs.label: a4_dependency_audit
jobs.prompt: Run dependency hygiene on these targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/pyproject.toml; Code&DBs/Workflow/requirements.runtime.txt; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package.json; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package-lock.json; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/cloudflare_sandbox_bridge/package.json. Run pip-audit and npm audit --audit-level=high. Land patch-only dependency bumps when verifier-gated. File canonical bugs for minor or major bumps and unresolved advisories with signatures dep-audit::<package>. Do not introduce plaintext secrets or new script authority. Done only when both audits exit 0 or every remaining non-patch action is represented by a bug.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "cd 'Code&DBs/Workflow' && pip-audit && cd surfaces/app && npm audit --audit-level=high"
